projects.title: Our Featured Projects
projects.description: Enterprise-grade software solutions built with modern technologies

items.title: UniCore Business Suite
items.description: Comprehensive ERP system with inventory management, accounting, order processing, and real-time analytics for complete business operations management.

items.title: UniCore HR Solutions
items.description: Complete HR management platform with employee management, payroll processing, attendance tracking with biometric integration, and AI-powered HR assistant.

items.title: Income Tax Calculator
items.description: Advanced tax calculation engine with multi-year support (2014-2026), bulk Excel processing, and detailed financial reporting for individuals and businesses.

items.title: Fannecto Messaging
items.description: Enterprise real-time messaging platform with Socket.io, end-to-end encryption, group chats, file sharing, and comprehensive notification system.

testimonials.title: Client Success Stories
testimonials.description: Businesses that transformed their operations with our solutions:

items.quote: The UniCore Business Suite transformed our inventory management, reducing processing time by 60% and improving our operational efficiency significantly.
The HR Solutions platform with AI assistant streamlined our entire HR workflow, reducing administrative overhead by 40% while improving employee satisfaction.
The tax calculation system saved us hundreds of hours in manual processing and improved our financial reporting accuracy by 95%.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
